title: Cinco de Mayo Celebration
desc: Celebrate the food, beer, wine, cocktails, entertainment and joy of Cinco de Mayo! Live music from Mariachi Jalisiense and a performance by Danza Azteca. Tuesday, May 5 · 4:00 PM – 9:00 PM

title: Mother's Day Buffet
desc: Celebrate Mother's Day with a special buffet at Corazón de León! Join us for a delicious spread in honor of all the amazing moms. Sunday, May 10 · Details to come.
